commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c1fc7dc3b2e80ce6371a3d7b134ea0c3288bca2e)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes `run-app-local.ps1` to default to direct unpackaged WinUI EXE launch, adds isolated data/update/dry-run/wait options, and updates README/build output launch guidance.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR sets `OPENCLAW_UPDATE_CHANNEL`, while current main has no reader for that variable and uses a fixed `UpdatumManager` update path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs maintainer direction on default launch semantics and contributor live behavior proof rather than an autonomous repair lane.

target.title: Simplify local app launch wrapper
target.body:
## Summary

- Make `run-app-local.ps1` default to direct unpackaged EXE launch for the common local development path.
- Keep Microsoft WinAppCLI / `winapp run` available behind `-UseWinApp` for manifest/MSIX-adjacent validation.
- Add `-Isolated`, `-DataDir`, `-UpdateChannel`, `-Wait`, and `-DryRun` options for cleaner multi-worktree and alpha-update testing.
- Update README and build output to point developers at the cleaner wrapper commands.

## Validation

- `./build.ps1`
- `dotnet test ./tests/OpenClaw.Shared.Tests/OpenClaw.Shared.Tests.csproj --no-restore` (`2023 passed / 29 skipped`)
- `dotnet test ./tests/OpenClaw.Tray.Tests/OpenClaw.Tray.Tests.csproj --no-restore` (`860 passed`)
- PowerShell parser check for `run-app-local.ps1`
- `./run-app-local.ps1 -NoBuild -Isolated -DryRun`
- `./run-app-local.ps1 -NoBuild -UseWinApp -NoDebugOutput -DryRun`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: shanselman

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
